article_title: Wasmtime Ships Largest-Ever Security Patch After LLM-Driven Audit Uncovers 12 Vulnerabilities Including Two Critical Sandbox Escapes

content_preview.title: Wasmtime Ships Largest-Ever Security Patch After LLM-Driven Audit Uncovers 12 Vulnerabilities Including Two Critical Sandbox Escapes
content_preview.summary: The Bytecode Alliance patches 12 Wasmtime flaws, two critical, found during a three-week LLM-assisted security sprint by Mozilla, UCSD, Akamai, and F5.
content_preview.body_excerpt:
## Overview

The Bytecode Alliance on April 9 released patch versions of its Wasmtime WebAssembly runtime addressing 12 distinct security vulnerabilities, two of them rated Critical. The disclosure represents the [largest batch of security advisories](https://bytecodealliance.org/articles/wasmtime-security-advisories) the project has ever published at once — triple the total number of advisories issued in all of 2025 and double the number of Critical-severity findings in the runtime's history.

...

editor_notes.content_quality: Excellent cybersecurity article with rich technical detail on CVEs, LLM audit methodology, and formal verification cross-check.
editor_notes.source_verification: Bytecode Alliance blog confirms all 12 advisories, 2 Critical (CVE-2026-34987/CVE-2026-34971), LLM harness by Kashiwa/UCSD, 11/12 found by LLM, 3-week sprint, Crichton remediation, formal verification cross-check, v32.0.0 introduction. GitHub release confirms April 9, v43.0.1, all vulnerability categories. NVD confirms CVE-2026-27204.
editor_notes.factual_accuracy: All CVEs, team attributions, and technical details verified against primary sources.
editor_notes.tone_assessment: Neutral and technically precise. Balances the vulnerability severity with the positive LLM audit methodology story.
editor_notes.originality: Cross-references existing WASI 0.3/Fermyon coverage appropriately. No prior Wasmtime security coverage.
editor_notes.overall_assessment: Outstanding cybersecurity article with primary source verification. Approved.
